---
title: "ABI Summer School 2026"
description: "Materials for the Summer School 08 - 19 June 2026"
toc: true
---

## About the event:
The aim is to provide comprehensive training on bioinformatics computational resources, and domain-specific tools and workflows to improve participants' proficiency in executing, interpreting, and communicating analyses for major bioinformatics studies, with a special focus on genomics.

---

## Course Content:

### Week 1: 

#### Linux 
[File Processing with sed](week1/file-processing-sed.md)

#### R coding content

#### Intro to NGS



---

### Week 2 

#### R/Biology Streams

#### Human Genomics

#### Pathogen Genomics

#### Metabolomics



---

## Trainer Info

| Name | Affiliation | Role | Stream |
|------|-------------|------|--------|
| Gloria Nakabiri | African Center of Excellence in Bioinformatics and Data Intensive Sciences | Lead trainer | Unix |
| Peter van Heusden | South African National Bioinformatics Institute (SANBI) | Lead trainer | R |
| Ian Wasukira | African Center of Excellence in Bioinformatics and Data-Intensive Sciences | Lead Trainer | Unix/HPC |
| Ronald Galiwango | African Center of Excellence in Bioinformatics and Data-Intensive Sciences | Lead trainer | R |
| Musalula Sinkala | University of Cape Town | Lead trainer | Human Genomics |
| Dayna Adrienne Croock | Stellenbosch University | Lead trainer | Human Genomics |
| John Juma | International Livestock Research Institute (ILRI) | Lead trainer | Pathogen Genomics |
| Damien Tully | MRC/UVRI & LSHTM Uganda Research Unit | Lead Trainer | Pathogen Genomics |
| Alfred Ssekagiri | Uganda Virus Research Institute | Lead trainer | Metagenomics |
| Yohannes Gedamu Gebre | Bio and Emerging Technology Institute (BETin); former Ethiopia Biotechnology Institute (EBTi) | Co-trainer | Unix/R/Pathogen Genomics |
| Keaghan Brown | PHA4GE | Co-trainer | Pathogen Genomics |
| Amadou Diallo | Pioneer Bio-Analytics | Co-trainer | Metagenomics |
| Ephifania Geza | University of Cape Town | Lead trainer | Metagenomics |
| Patricia Nabisubi | The African Centre of Excellence in Bioinformatics and Data Intensive Sciences | Co-trainer | Unix/R/NGS basics |
| Trushar Shah | International Livestock Research Institute (Kenya) | Co-trainer | Human Genomics/Unix |
| Daria Sokolova | European Bioinformatics Institute (EBI) | Core organiser/support | |
| Grace Kebirungi | African Center of Excellence in Bioinformatics and Data-Intensive Sciences | Core organiser/support | |
| David Twesigomwe | MRC/UVRI & LSHTM Uganda Research Unit | Core organiser/support | |
| Verena Ras | African Bioinformatics Institute / University of Cape Town | Core organiser/support | |
| Shaun Aron | Sydney Brenner Institute for Molecular Bioscience (SBIMB) / University of Witwatersrand | Core organiser/support | |
| Melek Chaouch | Institut Pasteur, Tunis | Core organiser/support | |
| Jorge da Rocha | European Bioinformatics Institute (EBI) | Core organiser/support | |
